heroBio: I’m a 4th-year Computer Engineering student passionate about building real-world software. I focus on full-stack development, AI systems, and scalable architectures, and I’ve gained hands-on experience through internships and academic projects where I turn ideas into working applications.
projectsSub: A selection of projects spanning healthcare, gov-tech, AI, mobile and web platforms.
communitySub: If you made it this far, thanks for visiting. Feel free to leave a message. I read every single one.
showLove: Show some love with a like. It really means a lot.
beFirst: Be the first to leave a message!
contactSub: Got a project, a job offer, or want to talk tech? Send me a message. I usually reply within a day.
subject: Subject
messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, opportunity, or question…
confirmation: ✨ You'll receive a personalized confirmation instantly
confirmationMsg: Here is your confirmation. Loqman will reply within 24-48h:
errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please email directly at
autoReply:
Dear {{name}},

Thank you{{company}} for reaching out through my portfolio! I've received your message regarding "{{subject}}" and truly appreciate you taking the time to write.

I'll review your message carefully and get back to you as soon as possible, usually within 24 to 48 hours.

Best regards,
Loqman Makouri
📧 loqmanmakouri66@gmail.com
sendAgainIn: You can send another message in {{seconds}} seconds

experienceList.title: IT Systems Internship
experienceList.desc: Designed and developed an intelligent doctor-patient follow-up platform for one of the largest university hospitals in eastern Morocco. Architected the data model, built the REST API, and delivered a full web interface for clinical staff.

experienceList.title: Digital Development Internship
experienceList.org: Direction Régionale de la Santé — Oujda
experienceList.desc: Built and deployed a complete leave management system for the Regional Health Directorate. Delivered end-to-end from requirements gathering to production deployment, serving multiple departments across the region.

projectList.name: PathFinder — AI Career Guide
projectList.desc: AI system helping students navigate career choices with personalized recommendations based on academic profile and interests.

projectList.name: EHEICHATHUB
projectList.desc: University-wide real-time communication platform for the EHEI campus: messaging, notifications, and collaboration.

projectList.name: Doctor-Patient Platform
projectList.desc: Intelligent medical tracking system built at CHU Mohammed VI. Digitizes patient follow-up workflows and care coordination for clinical staff.

projectList.name: Leave Management System
projectList.desc: Full-stack HR system deployed for the Regional Health Directorate of Oujda, streamlining leave requests across departments.

projectList.name: Weather App — Cordova
projectList.desc: Cross-platform weather application converted from web to mobile using Apache Cordova with real-time API integration.

projectList.name: Network Simulation
projectList.desc: Full enterprise network environment simulated under EVE-NG on Linux: routing, VLANs, switching, and security hardening.

projectList.name: Service Booking System
projectList.desc: Booking platform with intelligent time slot management, conflict detection, and calendar sync for service providers.
